summary: The user is seeking assistance in finding a task management app that also tracks screen time, expressing a desire to become more organized. They decided to try Todoist and RescueTime while aiming to limit their social media usage to 30 minutes a day, and they plan to focus on their photography hobby, particularly landscape photography, using their Canon EOS Rebel camera.
facts: The user is trying to get more organized and is looking for a task management app that can also help track screen time. The user decided to try out Todoist and RescueTime for task management and screen time tracking. The user is attempting to limit their social media usage to 30 minutes a day, down from hours spent on Instagram and Facebook. The user has set a timer on their phone to remind them to log off after 30 minutes of social media usage. The user currently uses a Canon EOS Rebel camera and a few prime lenses for photography. The user is particularly interested in landscape and nature photography, especially capturing sunsets and mountainscapes. The user has expressed a desire to visit Yellowstone National Park for photography, citing its incredible landscapes and wildlife as key attractions.
